steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, under the "Source Volume" selection section, choose the volume for segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Select the source volume for skull segmentation
sub_operations.question: Select the source volume for segmentation.

choice_info.question: Select the source volume for segmentation.

ui_guidance.title: Select the source volume for segmentation.
ui_guidance.instruction: Select the volume from the Source Volume section.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Cranial_Segmentation".

sub_operations.description: Create a new segmentation node named 'Cranial_Segmentation'

operation_descriptions: Create a new segmentation node named 'Cranial_Segmentation'

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Cranial_Segment".

sub_operations.description: Add a segment and rename it to 'Cranial_Segment'

ui_guidance.title: Add a segment and rename to 'Cranial_Segment'.

operation_descriptions: Add a segment and rename it to 'Cranial_Segment'

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.

sub_operations.description: Activate the Threshold effect in Segment Editor

operation_descriptions: Activate the Threshold effect in Segment Editor

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold range bar to set the range value for segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Set the threshold range for bone segmentation
sub_operations.question: Set the threshold range for segmentation.

choice_info.question: Set the threshold range for segmentation.

ui_guidance.title: Set threshold range.
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the range bar to the desired values.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply the threshold segmentation

steps.description: In the "Skull segmentation" section, choose the segment node.

sub_operations.description: Select the skull segmentation node from the extension UI
sub_operations.question: Choose the skull segmentation node.

ui_guidance.title: Choose skull segmentation node.
ui_guidance.instruction: Select the skull segment from the list.

steps.description: In the "Entry points" section, choose the Point List node.

sub_operations.description: Select the entry point fiducial node
sub_operations.question: Choose the point list (fiducial) node for entry points.

choice_info.question: Choose the point list (fiducial) node for entry points.

steps.description: Click the "1. Compute symmetry plane" button.

sub_operations.description: Compute the symmetry plane from skull segmentation and entry points

steps.description: In the "Crop radius (mm)" section, adjust the range bar to set the range value for crop.

sub_operations.description: Set the crop radius for cylindrical cutting
sub_operations.question: Set the crop radius (mm).

ui_guidance.title: Set crop radius (mm).
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the range bar for crop radius.

steps.description: Click the "2. Cut skull (cylinder)" button.

sub_operations.description: Cut the skull using a cylinder crop

steps.description: Click the "3. Seperate maxilla / mandible" button.

sub_operations.description: Separate maxilla and mandible using a default separation plane

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, tick the "Manually adjust the segmentation plane" checkbox. If not, jump to step 16.

sub_operations.description: Ask whether to manually adjust the separation plane
sub_operations.question: Manually adjust the segmentation plane?

ui_guidance.title: Manually adjust the segmentation plane?
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose Yes to adjust, No to skip.

steps.description: Manually adjust the separation plane.

sub_operations.description: Translate or rotate the separation plane handles

controller.prompt: Tick the 'Manually adjust the segmentation plane' checkbox to adjust the plane, or leave unchecked to jump to step 16.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust separation plane.
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the plane in the 3D view, then click Done.

steps.description: Click the "Apply separation" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply the manually adjusted separation plane to recompute maxilla/mandible

controller.prompt: Tick the 'Manually adjust the segmentation plane' checkbox to adjust the plane, or leave unchecked to jump to step 16.

steps.description: Click the "4. Identify zygomatic bones" button.

sub_operations.description: Identify zygomatic bones and create boundary planes

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, tick the "Manually adjust the boundary planes" checkbox. If not, jump to step 20.

sub_operations.description: Ask whether to manually adjust the boundary planes
sub_operations.question: Manually adjust the boundary planes?

ui_guidance.title: Manually adjust the boundary planes?
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose Yes to adjust, No to skip.

steps.description: Manually adjust the boundary planes.

sub_operations.description: Translate or rotate the boundary plane handles

controller.prompt: Tick the 'Manually adjust the boundary planes' checkbox to adjust the planes, or leave unchecked to jump to step 20.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust boundary planes.
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the planes in the 3D view, then click Done.

steps.description: Click the "Apply boundaries" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply the manually adjusted boundary planes to recompute zygoma

controller.prompt: Tick the 'Manually adjust the boundary planes' checkbox to adjust the planes, or leave unchecked to jump to step 20.

steps.description: Click the "5. Generate Implant paths" button.

sub_operations.description: Generate implant paths and create line nodes, implant models, and table

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, tick the "Manually adjust the paths" checkbox. If not, stop here.

sub_operations.description: Ask whether to manually adjust the implant paths
sub_operations.question: Manually adjust the paths?

ui_guidance.title: Manually adjust the paths?
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose Yes to adjust, No to skip.

steps.description: Manually adjust the paths.

sub_operations.description: Drag the end points of implant path lines to adjust

controller.prompt: Tick the 'Manually adjust the paths' checkbox to adjust the paths, or leave unchecked to stop here.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust implant paths.
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the paths in the 3D view, then click Done.

steps.description: Click the "Apply paths" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply the manually adjusted paths to update implant data and table

controller.prompt: Tick the 'Manually adjust the paths' checkbox to adjust the paths, or leave unchecked to stop here.
Tick the 'Manually adjust the segmentation plane' checkbox to adjust the plane, or leave unchecked to jump to step 16.
Tick the 'Manually adjust the boundary planes' checkbox to adjust the planes, or leave unchecked to jump to step 20.
Tick the 'Manually adjust the paths' checkbox to adjust the paths, or leave unchecked to stop here.
